stories.title: Solak sets up NFL training camps: Big questions, p...
stories.summary: Ben Solak sorts through the top training camp storylines, including the new Eagles offense and key injury recoveries.

stories.title: Barnwell built a 53-man roster entirely made up of...
stories.summary: Nick Herbig rushing the passer? DeMario Douglas catching passes from Fernando Mendoza? And more.

stories.title: Curry first active player to have own wing in HOF
stories.summary: Stephen Curry will become the first active player to be honored at the Naismith Basketball Hall of Fame with his own exhibit when it opens to the public Friday.

stories.title: MLBPA calls to preserve current system of draft
stories.summary: After MLB proposed cutting the draft from 20 to 12 rounds, slashing amateur signing bonuses by more than $150 million and preventing high schoolers from entering, the MLBPA called to preserve the current system while opening more doors to younger players.

stories.title: Georgia RB Dowdell in hospital after ATV accident
stories.summary: Georgia running back Dante Dowdell was involved in an ATV accident and is being treated for serious injuries at a hospital in Atlanta, Bulldogs coach Kirby Smart confirmed to ESPN on Tuesday.
